seams.name: Catalog List & Pagination
seams.description: Product catalog listing page with pagination, filtering, and navigation to CRUD operations
ui_components: Product data table (Name, Description, Brand, Type, Price, Stock info)
business_rules: Show product image from Pics folder
Show stock levels (Available, Restock threshold, Max stock)
migration_notes: Images from Pics/ folder must be copied to frontend/public/pics/
Maintain exact table layout and column order
Preserve pagination logic (page size, current page, total pages)
Keep same CSS classes for styling (esh-table, esh-button, esh-thumbnail, etc.)

seams.name: Catalog CRUD Operations
seams.description: Create, Edit, Details, and Delete operations for catalog items
ui_components: Form fields (Name, Description, Price, Stock fields)
business_rules: Price: positive decimal with max 2 decimals, range 0-9999999999999999.99
Required fields: Name, Price, Brand, Type
migration_notes: Preserve all validation rules exactly
Maintain form layout and field order
Keep same validation error messages
Implement client-side and server-side validation
Preserve dropdown population from database

seams.name: Data Access Layer
seams.description: Entity Framework DbContext, database initialization, and HiLo ID generation
business_rules: Use HiLo pattern for ID generation
Seed initial catalog data on first run
migration_notes: Replace EF6 with SQLAlchemy 2.x async
Preserve HiLo ID generation pattern if needed
Seed same initial data from PreconfiguredData
Support mock service for testing
Use async database operations in FastAPI

seams.name: Static Pages
migration_notes: Simple static React pages
No backend API needed
Preserve content and layout
Low priority - can be done last

layout.name: Site Layout & Navigation
layout.description: Master page layout with navigation, mobile view switching
migration_notes: Create React App Shell with navigation
Implement responsive design (no need for separate mobile master page)
Use React Router for navigation
Apply CSS from Content/ folder

infrastructure.name: Application Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: App startup, routing, bundling, DI configuration
migration_notes: Replace Autofac with FastAPI Depends() DI
Replace ASP.NET routing with FastAPI routes
Replace bundling with Vite
No need for Global.asax equivalent

css.action: Convert to Tailwind CSS or keep as imported styles

scripts.action: Analyze for business logic, rewrite in React
